name: libtext-iconv-perl
title: libtext-iconv-perl
summary: module to convert between character sets in Perl
description:
module to convert between character sets in Perl
The iconv() family of functions from XPG4 defines an API for converting
between character sets (e.g. UTF-8 to Latin1, EBCDIC to ASCII). They
are provided by libc6.
.
This package allows access to them from Perl via the Text::Iconv
package.
